instruction: Find the latest open issue in "openclaw/openclaw" matching keyword "bug", and save it as "#<number> <title>" to "$HOME/Desktop/gh_issue_search_4_1.txt". If no matching issue is found, save an empty file.
reference_command: gh issue list --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open --search 'bug sort:created-desc' --limit 1 --json number,title --jq '.[] | "#\(.number) \(.title)"' > "$HOME/Desktop/gh_issue_search_4_1.txt"

parameters.expected_command: gh issue list --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open --search 'bug sort:created-desc' --limit 1 --json number,title --jq '.[] | "#\(.number) \(.title)"'
